programme.title: The Breakfast Club
programme.desc: When Saturday detention started, they were the Jock, the Princess, the Brain, the Criminal, and the Basket Case, but by that afternoon they had become closer than any of them could have imagined.

programme.title: Carlito's Way
programme.desc: A former drug kingpin Carlito Brigante is sprung from prison by his high-powered attorney. He stuns the New York underworld by vowing to go straight from a history of violence, but his plans are undermined by misguided loyalties and an outmoded code of honour. In a life-or-death battle, Carlito takes on the relentless forces that refuse to let him go.

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: Incompetent detective Frank Drebin has to foil an attempt to assassinate the Queen as he woos Priscilla Presley.

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: What would you do if you knew that in a handful of days an enormous comet would collide with Earth and all humanity could be annihilated? The countdown to doomsday is underway in this exciting sci-fi action.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: The thrill of the hunt. It's the ultimate drug, and the more intense the rush, the higher the price. Chance, is the target of an evil mercenary who recruits homeless combat veterans for the 'amusement' of his clients, bored tycoons who will pay a half a million dollars to stalk and kill the most challenging prey of them all: Man.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: In this suspenseful action tale Jean-Claude Van Damme stars at Darren McCord, a retired fire fighter whose daughter is caught up in a terrorist's audacious plan to take out 17,000 hockey fans, including the VP, unless his insane financial demands are met.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: After barely escaping a raging Shanghai nightclub brawl, Indy crash-lands into the wilds of India where he uncovers a sinister scheme that has enslaved a remote village's children in a fortress-like mine. Indy must save the children and avoid becoming a slave himself to the evil Thuggee cult.

programme.title: The Untouchables
programme.desc: A veteran cop who joins forces with an upstart lawman to take down prohibition gangster Al Capone.

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: When Rachel Phelps becomes the owner of the Cleveland Indians following the death of her husband, she decides she would much rather live in Miami, where the weather is better and she can get a better stadium deal. But can she get this team of athletic misfits to take a dive so she can move the franchise? With a team like this, anything can happen - and probably will.

programme.title: Coming to America
programme.desc: Join an African Prince on an unforgettable comic quest to the New World, it's time for him to find a princess... and the mission leads him and his most loyal friends to Queens, New York. In disguise as an impoverished immigrant, the pampered prince quickly finds himself a new job, new friends, new digs, new enemies and lots of trouble.

programme.title: Planes, Trains & Automobiles
programme.desc: Businessman Neal is dying to get home for Thanksgiving and loud-mouthed Del, a shower curtain ring salesman is driving him nuts. Will they reach Chicago without killing each other?

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: An idle, good-natured bachelor, Uncle Buck is the last person you would think of to watch the kids. However, during a family crisis, he is suddenly left in charge of his nephew and nieces. Unaccustomed to suburban life, fun-loving Uncle Buck soon charms his younger relatives Miles and Maizy with his hefty cooking and his new way of doing the laundry. His carefree style does not impress everyone though, especially his rebellious teenage niece, Tia, and his impatient girlfriend, Chanice. With a little bit of luck and a lot of love, Uncle Buck manages to surprise everyone.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: After barely escaping a raging Shanghai nightclub brawl, Indy crash-lands into the wilds of India where he uncovers a sinister scheme that has enslaved a remote village's children in a fortress-like mine. Unaccustomed to suburban life, fun-loving Uncle Buck soon charms his younger relatives Miles and Maizy with his hefty cooking and his new way of doing the laundry. His carefree style does not impress everyone though, especially his rebellious teenage niece, Tia, and his impatient girlfriend, Chanice. With a little bit of luck and a lot of love, Uncle Buck manages to surprise everyone.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: This film begins after an epic battle left a great city torn, but with the world saved. As humanity picks up the pieces, a shadowy group reveals itself in an attempt to control the direction of history ... while an ancient, powerful new menace sets Earth in its crosshairs. With help from a new cast of humans, Optimus Prime and the Autobots rise to meet their most fearsome challenge yet. In an incredible adventure, they are swept up in a war of good and evil, ultimately leading to a climactic battle across the world.

programme.title: First Blood
programme.desc: When a small town police chief arrests a vagrant hitchhiker, little does he know that he has set in motion a catastrophic series of events. The vagrant in question is in fact John Rambo. Rambo makes a daring escape from the small town jail to the shelter of the mountains and prepares himself for a one man war.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: Vietnam veteran John Rambo is offered a prison pardon in exchange for a perilous mission: infiltrating communist Vietnam under deep cover to hunt for evidence of missing American servicement. His CIA handler Marshall Murdock insists that it is merely a reconnaissance operation. "Do not engage the enemy," Rambo is ordered, "Just take pictures." After a disastrous parachute drop, Rambo is left stranded in the jungles with only his combat knife and bow and arrows to protect him...

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: Rambo has withdrawn to a Buddhist monastery in Thailand, but his mentor, Colonel Trautman, asks him to help carry out a dangerous mission in Afghanistan. The Vietnam vet refuses. He has found peace, serenity, and is non-violent. Trautman attempts the mission alone, but is captured by the Soviets and is harshly interrogated by the cruel Colonel Zaysen. The CIA can do nothing and call upon Rambo. He needs a few moments to choose his weapons and bind his muscles before hitting his enemies like a hurricane, and in a few days he ravages the country.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: Former CIA analyst Jack Ryan travels to London with his wife and child. Upon being caught in the middle of a terrorist attack on a member of the royal family, Ryan helps to thwart the assailants. Ryan's courageous act, however, marks him and his family as a target for revenge in the sights of the terrorist whose brother Ryan killed.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The Terminator is now one of the good guys, sent back in time to protect John Connor, the boy destined to lead the freedom fighters of the future. Sarah Connor, John's mother is the quintessential survivor who has been institutionalised for her warning of the nuclear holocaust she knows is inevitable. Together, the threesome must find a way to stop the ultimate enemy - the T-1000, the most lethal Terminator ever created. This visual tour de force is also a touching human story of survival.
